title: Mace Density Breach Pack
description: This project adds animated accents to the mace, specifically the density and breach mace.
body:
This project adds animated accents to the **_mace_**, specifically the **density** and **breach** mace. The breach mace is colored red (accented), and the density mace is colored blue (accented)

Inspired By: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/breach-density-mace-skins/versions
